parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'last_backup_age_hours', COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - max(created_at)))/3600, 9999)::int,
  'last_backup_status', (SELECT status FROM system_backups ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1),
  'last_backup_type', (SELECT backup_type FROM system_backups ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1),
  'last_backup_destination', (SELECT destination FROM system_backups ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1),
  'last_backup_size_mb', COALESCE(round(((SELECT size_bytes FROM system_backups ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1)::numeric / 1048576), 2), 0),
  'failures_last_7d', (SELECT count(*) FROM system_backups WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND status='failed'),
  'success_last_7d', (SELECT count(*) FROM system_backups WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND status='success'),
  'total_backups_known', (SELECT count(*) FROM system_backups)
) AS report FROM system_backups;

SELECT raise_security_event(
  'data_breach_suspected'::text,
  'critical'::text,
  'cron'::text, '/cron_backup_verify'::text, 'backup_health'::text, NULL::uuid,
  'Backup verify FAIL: ultimo backup hace ' || ($1::int) || 'h, status: ' || COALESCE($2::text, '(ninguno)') || ', failures 7d: ' || $3::int,
  $4::jsonb
) AS event_id;
SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key='architect_email'

parameters.subject: [ARQUITAI CRITICAL] Backup verificacion fallida
parameters.message:
=

Backup en riesgo

El cron_backup_verify ha detectado problemas con el sistema de backups:

{{ JSON.stringify($('Check Backups').first().json.report, null, 2) }}

Acciones:

  • Verifica que cron_external_backup esta activo en n8n
  • Revisa logs de las ultimas ejecuciones (n8n executions)
  • Verifica que el destino de backup (Drive/S3) sigue accesible

parameters.query: INSERT INTO activity_log (action, agent_name, details) VALUES ('backup_verify_ok', 'cron_backup_verify', $1::jsonb);
